title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Periodontal Disease
description: Thymus vulgaris essential oils contains a compound called thymol, which has antimicrobial properties that help combat the bacteria associated with periodontal disease. Thymol's ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria, such as Porphyromonas gingivalis and Aggregatibacter actinomycetemcomitans, reduces the risk of infection and inflammation in the gums and teeth.
